# Postgres MCP Manager (Legacy Alias)

This alias exists for backward compatibility.

For new projects, use `.github/skills/database-mcp-manager/SKILL.md` as the primary reference.

## Usage

If the project uses PostgreSQL, apply the same rules from the generic database skill with PostgreSQL-specific queries.
